# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-proxy-config
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: api-gateway
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: LISTENER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      listener:
        filterChain:
          filter:
            envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager:
              routeConfig:
                name: local_route
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        http_filters:
        - name: envoy.filters.http.router
  - applyTo: CLUSTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      cluster:
        name: outbound|http|service-a
    patch:
      operation: INSERT_BEFORE
      value:
        connect_timeout: 0.25s
        lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
        load_assignment:
          cluster_name: outbound|http|service-a
          endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
            - endpoint:
                address:
                  socket_address:
                    address: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
                    port_value: 80
  - applyTo: CLUSTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      cluster:
        name: outbound|http|service-b
    patch:
      operation: INSERT_BEFORE
      value:
        connect_timeout: 0.25s
        lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
        load_assignment:
          cluster_name: outbound|http|service-b
          endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
            - endpoint:
                address:
                  socket_address:
                    address: service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
                    port_value: 80
